items.claim: Robert Whittaker will have a speed advantage moving up to light heavyweight.
items.quote: he's going to have the speed advantage

items.claim: Robert Whittaker will have a cardio advantage because he is not cutting as much weight.
items.quote: he should have the cardio advantage because he hasn't cut a lot of weight

items.claim: Six out of Nikita Krylov's last seven fights have ended in finishes.
items.quote: six out of his seven fights have been finishes

items.claim: Bobby Green fights with his hands down and relies on head movement.
items.quote: Bobby Green fights with his hands down and moving his head back and forth

items.claim: Terrence McKinney is a fast starter who blitzes opponents with hard combinations early.
items.quote: he is a fast starter. He comes out and he blitzes his opponents throwing fierce, quick, hard combination
